title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
slides: Can Acti make your keyboard think for you?
It embeds AI agents directly into your typing flow.
No app switching—agents act on text you type.
Your keyboard now books meetings, sends emails, and more.
Start by typing a task—see the difference today.
thread_text:
1. Your keyboard just got a raise.

Acti embeds AI agents into your typing flow, so you don't leave the app to get work done.

2. Stop switching tabs.

Agents act on the text you type—no copy-paste, no new windows. Just type and delegate.

3. Your keyboard books meetings.

It sends emails, schedules calls, and drafts replies while you keep typing. No manual follow-up.

4. But here’s the twist.

The agents don't guess—they execute based on your typed commands. You control the output by typing the task.

5. Start typing a task today.

Open a doc, type "book a meeting with Sarah at 3pm," and let the keyboard handle the rest. Seen it work?
video_script: Your keyboard just got a raise.
It books meetings as you type.
Type a task, see the difference.

script: Your keyboard just got a raise.
It books meetings as you type.
Type a task, see the difference.

instagram.caption:
Your keyboard now schedules emails and books meetings without you ever leaving the chat app you’re typing in.

Acti embeds AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard, not as a sidebar or separate app. The agents read what you type and execute that task — from sending a message to scheduling a call — while you keep typing.

No more copy-pasting between tools or pausing your flow. You just type “invite the team to next Tuesday at 10am” and the keyboard handles the rest.

If your typing flow is your main work interface, what’s the one task you’d delegate to a keyboard agent first?

carousel_slides.description: Acti embeds AI agents into your keyboard to schedule and send—no app switching required.
Agents act directly on text you type—no tabs, no tedious manual transfers needed.
It books meetings, sends emails, and drafts replies while you keep typing effortlessly.

carousel_slides.hook: Type a command, see it happen.
carousel_slides.description: Agents execute based on your typed commands—you control output by typing the task.
Open a doc, type 'book a meeting with Sarah at 3pm'—let the keyboard handle the rest.
